name: Switch Discount Tracker
description: Monitor Nintendo Switch eShop discounts across multiple regions. Add game NSUIDs and region codes; get a separate timeline event for each region where a watched game is on sale, with original price, sale price, and discount percentage.
author: Sidefy Team

game_ids.description: Comma-separated list of Nintendo Switch game NSUIDs to watch (up to 20). Use the NSUID for the region you are monitoring — the same title may have different NSUIDs in Japan vs. Americas eShops. Letter prefixes such as D are stripped automatically. Example: 70010000077806,70010000020840,70010000065090

regions.description: Comma-separated eShop region codes. Code reference: JP=Japan, US=United States, CA=Canada, MX=Mexico, BR=Brazil, GB=United Kingdom, DE=Germany, FR=France, AU=Australia. Example: US,BR,JP (United States, Brazil, Japan). Defaults to all nine regions if empty or invalid.
